image:image.image:title: CVwise — AI CV Optimizer powered by Claude AI
image:image.image:caption: CVwise AI CV Optimizer: upload your CV, paste a job URL, and Claude AI optimizes it for ATS systems

image:image.image:title: BudgetWise — Free Personal Budget Tracker with OCR Receipt Scanning
image:image.image:caption: BudgetWise: track income, expenses, and forecast your year-end finances for free

image:image.image:title: BoatWise — Boat Maintenance App for Yacht and Motorboat Owners
image:image.image:caption: BoatWise: smart boat management app for sailboat and motorboat owners in 5 languages

image:image.image:title: DocWise — Free PDF Tools: Merge, Split, Compress, OCR
image:image.image:caption: DocWise: privacy-first PDF toolbox — merge, split, compress, image to PDF, OCR, bulk rename
